description: Shelf-life-aware diagnostic for dairy & chilled SKUs (milk, laban, yogurt, cheese, juice). Surfaces expiring batches, projected shelf-life shortfalls, and recommends markdown / redirect / expedite / donate actions at batch grain.
tooltip_text: Focus: shelf-life-aware projected inventory + expiry-risk resolution for dairy and chilled SKUs.

show.label: Expiring in 48h
show.text: Which cheese, yogurt, and laban batches expire in the next 48 hours across the network?

show.label: Milk sellable at East
show.text: Project milk sellable-on-hand at STORE-EAST for the next 7 days considering expiry.

show.label: Excess perishable
show.text: Where am I carrying perishable inventory that won't sell before expiry?

show.label: Feta at CDC
show.text: Show the batch status for CHEESE-FETA-400G at CDC-DAIRY-01.

diagnose.label: Why feta at risk?
diagnose.text: Why is feta cheese at CDC-DAIRY-01 at risk — give me the root cause and evidence.

diagnose.label: Milk East RSL
diagnose.text: MILK-FULL-1L at STORE-EAST has batches expiring in 1 day — what's driving it?

diagnose.label: Yogurt slow
diagnose.text: Diagnose why YOGURT-FRUIT-4P at CDC-DAIRY-02 is slow-moving against its shelf life.

diagnose.label: Top perishable risks
diagnose.text: Diagnose the top 3 perishable risks in my network right now.

solve.label: Yogurt shortfall
solve.text: YOGURT-PLAIN-500G at STORE-WEST will shortfall on Day 3 before next delivery — what's the plan?

solve.label: Milk East mitigation
solve.text: Milk at STORE-EAST has 60% of on-hand expiring in 1 day — best mitigation?

solve.label: Markdown ≤1d RSL
solve.text: Propose a markdown / redirect / donation plan for all batches with RSL ≤ 1 day.

solve.label: Solve feta risk
solve.text: Solve the CHEESE-FETA-400G expiry risk at CDC-DAIRY-01 — give me concrete next steps.

simulate.label: Expedite laban
simulate.text: If I expedite a fresh LABAN-500ML batch from RDC-DAIRY-NORTH, does STORE-EAST clear the shortfall?

simulate.label: Redirect yogurt
simulate.text: If I redirect aged YOGURT-FRUIT-4P from CDC-DAIRY-02 to STORE-MALL-01 (highest velocity), how much waste drops?

simulate.label: Markdown network-wide
simulate.text: If I apply a 25% markdown network-wide on ≤1-day-RSL items, what's the projected waste avoided and revenue impact?

simulate.label: Cold-chain event
simulate.text: If CHEESE-FETA-400G at CDC-DAIRY-01 loses the cold chain for 4 hours, how does projected sellable inventory change?
